items.title: Watch: Match of the Day
items.summary: Kelly Cates presents highlights from the day’s four Premier League games.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Grieving Hansi Flick Leads Barcelona to La Liga Title With Win Over Real Madrid
items.summary: Led by Hansi Flick, who was grieving the death of his father, Barcelona retains Spanish league title after beating Real Madrid 2-0.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Somerset regain the ascendancy after hard-fought third day
items.summary: Abell makes crucial runs before Glamorgan lose five wickets in 283-run chase
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
